parameters.jsCode: const r=$json||{};const token=r.access_token||r.id_token||r.token||r.AccessToken||(r.AuthenticationResult&&r.AuthenticationResult.AccessToken)||(r.authenticationResult&&r.authenticationResult.accessToken);if(!token){const msg=(r&&typeof r==='object')?JSON.stringify(r).slice(0,400):String(r);throw new Error('FAOSTAT login did not return access token. Check FAOSTAT_USERNAME/FAOSTAT_PASSWORD and Developer Portal access. Raw='+msg);}return [{json:{access_token:token,token_type:'Bearer',authenticated_at:new Date().toISOString()}}];

parameters.text: ={{ JSON.stringify({ area_name: $json.area_name, item_name: $json.item_name, latest_year: $json.latest_year, latest: $json.latest, previous: $json.previous, derived_metrics: $json.derived_metrics, pp_latest_monthly: $('FAOSTAT Parse PP').item.json.pp_latest_monthly, pp_derived_metrics: $('FAOSTAT Parse PP').item.json.pp_derived_metrics, pp_summary_en: $('FAOSTAT Parse PP').item.json.pp_summary_en, movement_label: $json.movement_label, rule_based_signals: $json.signals, fallback_summary_en: $json.summary_en }, null, 2) }}

messageValues.message:
You are interpreting FAOSTAT coffee data for a Lavazza intelligence system. Use QCL agricultural production signals (production volumes, yield, harvested area, exports) and, when available, PP producer-price context. Describe trends and year-over-year or month-over-month changes factually — do not assign valence.

Output format:
{
  "movement_label": "...",
  "signals": ["..."],
  "summary_en": "..."
}

movement_label options: supply_expanding|supply_tightening|yield_declining|area_contracting|stable
Rules:
- signals: max 5 short English strings describing observable facts
- DO NOT assign positive/negative valence — just describe what is happening
- movement_label: one concise label describing the current situation
- summary_en: 1-2 English sentences, factual only
- return JSON only, no extra text
